title: The TNT Mod
description: Helps you ruin your world more efficiently!
body:
**REQUIRES PEHKUI**

This is a mod that adds more TNT to Minecraft, which you could probably deduce from the title. I would say that some are utility and some are destruction but.... hmm..... nah..... they're basically just all destruction....... for now at least. The TNTs in this mod are as follows:



 
TNT x2 - its tnt but 2x stronger....

TNT x5 - its tnt but 5x stronger....

TNT x10 - you get it already

Cluster TNT - same explosion strength as tnt x2 but spawns 10 extra tnt

Clusterer TNT - same explosion strength as tnt x5 but spawns 10 cluster tnts

Cluster TNT x2 - clusterer tnt but spawns tnt x2 instead of cluster tnt

Nuclear Bomb - 100x100 spherical explosion and spreads fire everywhere

Acre Destroyer - obliterates everything in a 500x500 block distance with a low blast resistance (grass, sand, etc)

Memory Breaker - regular tnt explosion but with 10000 explosion power..... yeah

Randomizer Nuke - nuke but spreads random tnt everywhere instead of fire

Meteor TNT - has a slightly larger radius than tnt x10 and spreads fire everywhere, spawns in the sky and explodes when touching the ground

FGHSDJKSAFKLDSF - 800x800 block cubic explosion. also funyn fact this tnt came to me in a dream

Classic Nuke - uses a series of consecutive 100 power explosions to make a crater as seen in some older tnt mods

Sphere TNT - explodes in a sphere

Cube TNT - explodes in a cube

Sphube TNT - explodes in a sphube (rounded cube, i ran out of ideas for tnt kinda)

InstanTNT - tnt but instant, can be used for activating a lot of tnt at once

Antimatter TNT - slightly smaller explosion than nuke but ignores blast resistance and can break things like bedrock, also puts obsidian and crying obsidian everywhere

Hydrogen Bomb - nuclear bomb but bigger. simple as that

Corruption TNT - turns nearby blocks into tnt and then explodes them

Empowering TNT - gains explosion power by absorbing nearby valuable blocks, this doesnt have a limit so this technically can become more powerful than fghsdjksafkldsf and supernova tnt. further explanation in block description

Shockwave TNT - makes a horizontal shockwave of explosions, not recommended to blow up multiple of these in succession

Clusterest TNT - same explosion strength as tnt x10 but spawns 10 clusterer tnts (why)

Molten TNT - explodes and puts fire and lava everywhere

War - rains random tnt for 10 minutes (it will be longer because of lag) and explodes like a hydrogen bomb afterwards

null TNT - explodes in a series of cubes that ignore blast resistance, kinda hard to explain

TNT - just regular tnt, why would you think otherwise?

Black Hole TNT - grows and destroys blocks in a sphere, also ignores blast resistance

Supernova TNT - yes, i had to make a new strongest tnt. 1200 block wide spherical explosion that always has a 1 in 3 chance of destroying blocks if they're over 5000 blast resistance. also spreads fire and soul fire over a 1500 block distance. ALSO also creates a shockwave and causes a thunderstorm when ignited

Trimming TNT - destroys blocks in a sphere, but only destroys blocks with air directly above them

Water TNT - molten tnt but with water... yeah

Cluster TNT x5 - clusterest tnt but spawns tnt x5 instead of clusterer tnt


(made with mcreator)
